title: ConflictAnnotation
description: Schema for context-memory conflict annotations (research scaffold).

id.description: Unique identifier for this annotation instance.

internal_answer.description: Answer implied by model parametric knowledge (may be paraphrased or labeled).

external_evidence.description: Retrieved passage(s) or summarized external evidence.

evidence_source.description: Provenance of external evidence (e.g., doc id, URL placeholder, dataset id).

conflict_type.description: Conflict subtype label; primary project focus is context-memory.

resolution_rule.description: Human- or expert-defined rule for which source to prefer and why.

chosen_answer.description: Preferred response under the resolution rule (DPO chosen).

rejected_answer.description: Dispreferred response violating the resolution rule (DPO rejected).

valid_time.description: Temporal validity window or as-of date for time-sensitive facts.

condition.description: Scope or conditions under which the resolution rule applies.

notes.description: Annotator notes, ambiguity flags, or review comments.
